# runtime

```go
import "github.com/jbcom/radioactive-ralph/internal/runtime"
```

Package runtime owns the durable repo service engine and its local process coordination helpers.

- [type Options](<#Options>)

<a name="Options"></a>
## type [Options](<https://github.com/jbcom/radioactive-ralph/blob/main/internal/runtime/service.go#L32-L42>)

Options configures one repo\-scoped runtime instance.

```go
type Options struct {
    RepoPath          string
    TickInterval      time.Duration
    HeartbeatInterval time.Duration
    ShutdownTimeout   time.Duration
    RunnerFactory     RunnerFactory
    SessionMode       plandag.SessionMode
    SessionTransport  plandag.SessionTransport
    VariantFilter     variant.Name
    ExitWhenIdle      bool
}
```

<a name="RunnerFactory"></a>
## type [RunnerFactory](<https://github.com/jbcom/radioactive-ralph/blob/main/internal/runtime/service.go#L29>)

RunnerFactory resolves a configured provider binding into a runnable backend.

```go
type RunnerFactory func(binding provider.Binding) (provider.Runner, error)
```

<a name="Service"></a>
## type [Service](<https://github.com/jbcom/radioactive-ralph/blob/main/internal/runtime/service.go#L55-L73>)

Service is the durable repo\-scoped runtime authority.

```go
type Service struct {
    // contains filtered or unexported fields
}
```

<a name="NewService"></a>
### func [NewService](<https://github.com/jbcom/radioactive-ralph/blob/main/internal/runtime/service.go#L76>)

```go
func NewService(opts Options) (*Service, error)
```

NewService constructs a repo\-scoped runtime with validated defaults.

<a name="Service.Run"></a>
### func \(\*Service\) [Run](<https://github.com/jbcom/radioactive-ralph/blob/main/internal/runtime/service.go#L112>)

```go
func (s *Service) Run(ctx context.Context) error
```

Run starts the repo runtime and blocks until shutdown or context cancel.

<a name="Service.Shutdown"></a>
### func \(\*Service\) [Shutdown](<https://github.com/jbcom/radioactive-ralph/blob/main/internal/runtime/service.go#L174>)

```go
func (s *Service) Shutdown()
```

Shutdown asks the service loop to stop gracefully.
